title: T-030 — API: D365 SO pull worker [LEGACY-D365]
prompt:
Implement D365 SO pull worker per PRD §15.2 (FR-PLAN-037). Cron-triggered job (per planning_settings.d365_so_pull_cron) + on-demand endpoint `POST /api/planning/d365/pull-so`:
1. Query D365 SO endpoint via 03-TECHNICAL §13 D365 adapter (mockable in tests).
2. Filter: status ∈ d365_so_status_filter, delivery_date ≤ now() + d365_so_pull_window_days.
3. Per SO: dedupe by source_reference=so_id (V-PLAN-D365-002/003).
4. New SO: createWorkOrder with source_of_demand='d365_so', source_reference=so_id, status='DRAFT' (planner approves manually). Trigger cascade if BOM has intermediates.
5. Emit outbox event 'wo.created_from_d365_so'.
6. Log batch summary (rows, woCreated, errors) to outbox events.

Feature flag gate `integration.d365.so_trigger.enabled` from settings.

RED test asserts dedupe (same SO twice → 1 WO), feature flag off → no-op, batch summary written.

pipeline_inputs.description: Cron + on-demand D365 SO pull → draft WO generation with idempotent dedupe and feature-flag gate.
pipeline_inputs.details: D365 adapter `from '@/server/integrations/d365'` (03-TECHNICAL §13 prereq). Use BullMQ or vercel cron for scheduling. Per-batch transaction is bounded (max 100 SOs per batch); rollback per-SO on cascade error, continue batch. Retry with exponential backoff (max 3) for transient D365 errors; dead-letter to outbox on final failure (V-PLAN-D365-004).
acceptance_criteria: Given a D365 SO is fetched twice within the same window, when the worker runs both times, then exactly 1 WO is created (V-PLAN-D365-003).
Given d365_so_trigger_enabled=false, when on-demand pull runs, then HTTP 409 with code 'D365_SO_TRIGGER_DISABLED' and no WOs are created.
Given a transient D365 error on SO #2 of 3, when worker retries 2x and succeeds, then all 3 WOs are created and outbox batch summary records 0 errors.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/jobs/__tests__/d365-so-pull.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for dedupe, feature flag gate, retry/back-off, batch summary.
Mock D365 adapter for deterministic responses.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass feature flag — V-PLAN-D365-001 + 15.5.
Do not auto-release WOs — must remain DRAFT until planner approves.
